content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving leftward, and the car appears well-positioned near the center of the track continuing through the left-curving section.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 26, target index = (26+5) % 121 = 31
- Target WP31: x=7.2724, y=1.5659
- Car: x=6.8565, y=0.9160, heading=28.180°
- dy = 1.5659 - 0.9160 = 0.6499, dx = 7.2724 - 6.8565 = 0.4159
- bearing = atan2(0.6499, 0.4159) = 57.38°
- delta = 57.38 - 28.180 = +29.20° → steer left (positive)

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3807m, distance_from_center = 0.01536m
- is_left_of_center = true, edge_distance (left) = 0.3807 - 0.01536 = 0.3653m → well clear
- No boundary override needed

Delta ~+29.2° → |delta| 15-30°, speed=1.5, steering_angle=10 to 15. Delta is near the upper end of this range, use steering_angle=15.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead, WP31 bearing gives delta ~+29.2° (left), car is well-centered, continuing with steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 to follow the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the left curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading ~28° (nearly northeast), well-centered on track.",
    "Left curve ahead requires progressive left steering (positive delta) to follow waypoints.",
    "Steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 is appropriate for delta ~29-33°.",
    "No objects on track detected, boundary well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.6131, 6.6980, 6.7770, 6.8565],
    "y": [0.7527, 0.7957, 0.8493, 0.9160],
    "heading": [11.232, 16.130, 22.182, 28.180]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP31 at (7.272, 1.566): bearing=57.38°, delta=+29.20° → moderate-left steer.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
